constraints.name: warnNoDeposit
constraints.messageTemplate: Order {orderNumber} is confirmed but deposit not yet paid

constraints.name: warnGuestCountChange
constraints.messageTemplate: Guest count changing significantly from {oldCount} to {newCount}

value.value: Can only record deposit on draft or confirmed orders
Order does not require a deposit
Can only schedule delivery for draft or confirmed orders
Can only start prep on confirmed orders
Can only deliver orders that are in progress
Can only complete orders that have been delivered

policies.name: CateringOrderManagement
policies.message: Event coordinators and catering managers can manage orders

policies.name: CateringOrderConfirm
policies.message: Only catering managers and above can confirm orders

policies.name: CateringOrderCancel
policies.message: Only catering managers and above can cancel orders
